title: Fix exact-SHA release verification
outOfScope: Rewriting or deleting v0.5.29 or any historical release

sources.reason: The failed v0.5.29 run proves the verification step references a remote tag that the local checkout has not fetched.
Workflow contract tests must prevent regression of the tag-fetch prerequisite.
Release documentation defines the exact-SHA and strict smoke publication sequence.

riskAssessment.reason: A missing local tag ref caused the exact-SHA release workflow to fail after creating the draft release.

executionDecision.reason: The failure evidence identifies a bounded workflow fix and its regression test.

preReviewWarnings: Verify the remote tag is fetched before local tag-target validation and that the release workflow remains exact-SHA bound.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release.yml fetches the newly created release tag before using git rev-parse to validate its commit target.
tests/test_workflows.py asserts the fetch-before-validation ordering and exact-SHA release checks.
The workflow remains action-dependency-free and retains strict smoke verification before publication.
The release workflow test suite passes locally and the merged workflow publishes v0.5.29 successfully.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Remote release tag is available to local target validation
Exact-SHA and strict smoke gates remain blocking

intent.problem: The first v0.5.29 release attempt created a draft release but failed because the verification step used a tag ref absent from the local checkout.
constraints: Do not rewrite v0.5.28 or an existing v0.5.29 tag.
Do not bypass smoke or compatibility gates.
intent.rationale: Fetch the immutable remote tag explicitly before validating its target, and lock that ordering with a workflow contract test.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized fully automatic execution of the remediation loop, including CI and release workflow fixes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
